# Let's use readelf to check .debug_aranges

/Length:/ { unit = $0 }
/^    0x/ {
  start = strtonum($1)
  len = strtonum($2)

  if (start <= 0x2f4c84 && end > 0x2f4c84) print "0x2f4c84 in CU starting at " $1 " len " $2
}' | head -5
